query:
SELECT 
  r.id, r.reference, r.status, r.booking_date, r.product_id, r.product_name, r.people,
  ro.id as op_id, ro.op_status, ro.client_confirmed, ro.monitor_id,
  DATE_FORMAT(r.booking_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as date_formatted
FROM reservations r
LEFT JOIN reservation_operational ro ON ro.reservation_id = r.id
WHERE r.id = 420001 OR r.reference = 'RES-MNBT8XOR';
